dialog.stepLabel: 完成副本后C级对话（传送）
dialog.nodeDesc: 完成副本后C级对话（传送）

items.speaker: Xiangli Yao
items.text: Are you alright? It's not uncommon to feel a bit queasy after leaving a Sonoro Sphere.

options.text: I'm fine. Not feeling off at all.
Sonoro Spheres? More like my playground.

items.speaker: Xiangli Yao
items.text: Given the situation is now under control, it should be fine. I will check on Patty, just to be safe.

items.speaker: Rover
items.text: (He might need some time alone to process what just happened...)

items.speaker: Xiangli Yao
items.text: Don't worry about me, {PlayerName}. I can handle the rest myself. It's just a quick checkup on Patty.

items.speaker: Xiangli Yao
items.text: Go join the celebration down the mountain. Remember those kids you promised to meet up with? They must be waiting for you.

items.speaker: Xiangli Yao
items.text: Besides, I need some time to prepare a small gift for you, as thanks. I'll... catch up with you later.
